instagram_caption:
Cracking HTB Support felt like finding a spare key under the mat — except the "mat" was a public SMB share, and the key unlocked the whole building.  
This Easy box taught me how a simple misstep — storing a password in Active Directory’s info field — can snowball into domain takeover. The real eye-opener? Leveraging SeMachineAccountPrivilege + GenericAll abuse via RBCD to forge a Golden Ticket as Administrator. It’s a stark reminder: in AD, overprivileged groups and loose credentials are hacker fuel.  
🌐 https://cyberstefan.nl  
#HackTheBox #SupportMachine #ActiveDirectory #RBCD #PrivilegeEscalation #CyberSecurity #Infosec #EthicalHacking #TryHackMe #VulnerabilityResearch #WindowsSecurity #LDAP #PassTheHash #RedTeam #CyberSecurityAwareness
